creator: wolman@cs.washington.edu
text:
The libwmf port installs header files in ${PREFIX}/include files that
have bad nested includes.  This patch fixes those problems.  It is
needed in order to allow the mswordview port to perform conversion
on wmf files.

The patch is at
http://www.cs.washington.edu/homes/wolman/patches/libwmf.patch

Fix: 

see above.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
